title: Progression Plus
description: This mod adds a tier between Iron and Diamond, called Mystium.
body:
This mod adds new stuff to ease the progression of Minecraft a bit better! Currently, there's only one tier of armor, but more stuff will be added eventually. On the topic of said armor, the item the tier is made from is known as Mystium. Mystium isn't like other ores in the sense that it can't be crafted into the tools itself, but needs to be combined with Iron tools in a Smithing Table to be made. Mystium tier items are stronger than Iron, but weaker than Diamond, so that it doesn't feel like you're on early game items for an unecessary amount of time.

PLANNED ITEMS
- Item-based Enchanted Book crafting (Surrounding a book with certain items to make an Enchanted Book, for example, surrounding a book with blaze powder to get a Fire Aspect book)
- More Advancements
- **Maybe** a new boss along the lines of the Warden where it spawns in a certain biome, but you can defeat it for an actual reward.
- Mystium armor trims
- **Probably** not much else...
